message:
fix(pattern-trigger): resolve AhoCorasick::new generic type inference error

The aho-corasick 1.1.4 AhoCorasick::new takes two generic parameters (I, P).
The empty fallback `AhoCorasick::new(&[""; 0])` failed type inference under
nightly. Use `AhoCorasick::new(Vec::<&str>::new())` for unambiguous empty
pattern construction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
